tool_args.raw_text: January 2024 Crime Report submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau providing statistical information regarding the number of major felonies and hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system.

warnings: source.document_kind is accepted as passthrough, but prefer content_type. Document kind label.

source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: NYPD's Transit Bureau
tool_args.raw_text: The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month prior to the reporting period.

payload.description: The Transit Bureau of the NYPD, responsible for submitting monthly crime reports on major felonies and hate crimes in the NYCT Subway system

tool_args.label: Report Purpose
tool_args.raw_text: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies (including homicide, robbery, assault, and rape) in addition to hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system.

payload.claim_text: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies (including homicide, robbery, assault, and rape) in addition to hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system.
